nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, qp.total_marks, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.max_marks IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT akr.question_id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak_preparer.approved_by) AS num_preparers, ak.approved_status, app_user.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM question_paper qp JOIN question q ON q.qp_id = qp.id JOIN answer_key_rubric akr ON akr.answer_key_id = q.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.id = akr.answer_key_id AND ak.qp_id = qp.id JOIN answer_key_preparer ak_preparer ON ak_preparer.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN app_user ON app_user.id = ak_preparer.approved_by WHERE qp.status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY qp.title, qp.total_marks, ak.approved_status, app_user.display_name
